leadText: Meowstic (Japanese: ニャオニクス Nyaonix) is a Psychic-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves from Espurr starting at level 25. Meowstic can Mega Evolve into Mega Meowstic using the Meowsticite. Mega Meowstic was introduced in the Mega Dimension DLC for Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] A male and a female Meowstic with their ears unfolded Meowstic is a bipedal, feline Pokémon whose appearance differs drastically between genders. Both genders have two tails, folded ears, a small collar of fur around the neck, and a tuft of fur on top of the head. On the inner surface of the tips of each ear, there is an eye-like organ with a ring at its center. This organ can emit psychic energy powerful enough to obliterate a 10-ton truck or tanker into dust. When Meowstic uses its abilities, the organ glows light blue. Meowstic usually keeps its ears folded at all times to keep its psychic powers in check, but it will unleash its power if threatened. Male and female Meowstic differ in various ways , most notably in their appearances, temperaments, and the moves they learn. The male Meowstic is predominantly dark blue. Its eyes are green with light blue sclerae. The organ in its ears is green with a light blue ring. The tuft of fur between its ears is white and curves slightly to the side and the collar around its neck is white with several stray tufts of fur. It has pointed ears with white at the fold and on the tips of its ears; there is also a white ring near the tips of its ears. Its tails are also pointed with white tips and a white ring near the end. There is a tuft of fur on each hip and it has white paws. Male Meowstic has a strong defensive instinct, as it prefers to support its allies rather than attack despite being strong enough to blast away any opponent. It is willing to use its full power to protect itself or its partners. When a male Meowstic continues to emit its powerful psychic energy, it will damage its body as a side effect. The female Meowstic is predominantly white. Its ears have no markings and curled tips and its eyes are red with yellow sclerae. The organ in its ears is red with a yellow ring. The tuft of fur on its head is blue and curled, as is the collar around its neck. Its tails are blue at the base and end in white, fluffy curls. There are blue, stocking-like markings around its paws and two tufts of fur on each hip. Female Meowstic is known to be a bit more selfish, aggressive, and aversive than its male counterpart. Should it not get what it wants, it will torment anyone with its psychic abilities. It generally has a stoic expression even when using its powers, and its unfriendliness is part of its charm. When it senses danger, it will unleash its psychic power at its maximum strength with no regard for its opponent. Forms [ edit | edit source ] Meowstic can Mega Evolve into Mega Meowstic. Mega Meowstic's eyes opening when attacking. Mega Meowstic's appearance combines the appearances of both variations of Meowstic; as such, there is no visual difference between a male and female Mega Meowstic. Its left half generally takes from female Meowstic, with dominantly white body fur, dark blue arm and leg, and a yellow eye; while its right half generally takes from male Meowstic, with dominantly dark blue fur, white arm and leg, and a green eye. Both eyes have pure white pupils and generally appear closed, but may open when Mega Meowstic unleashes its powers. Mega Meowstic's ears, in contrast, are always unfurled with their eye-like organs fully visible. The tufts of fur on top of Mega Meowstic's head and around its neck are long and spiky, and are both white and dark blue. Continuing the gender duality theme, Mega Meowstic has two tails, one ending in a curled tip like that of female Meowstic and one ending in a spiky tip like that of male Meowstic. Both tails are white with dark blue coloration near their bases. Mega Meowstic's psychic powers allows it to compress or expand any object, overwhelming its opponents by folding space itself. Mega Meowstic levitates constantly using its psychic powers. Mega Meowstic Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Meowstic evolves from Espurr . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Espurr Psychic Male → First Evolution Meowstic Male Psychic Female → First Evolution Meowstic Female Psychic

Generation VI Central Kalos #115 Coastal Kalos #— Mountain Kalos #— Hoenn #— X When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck into dust. Y The eyeball patterns on the interior of its ears emit psychic energy. It keeps the patterns tightly covered because that power is too immense. Omega Ruby When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck into dust. Alpha Sapphire The eyeball patterns on the interior of its ears emit psychic energy. It keeps the patterns tightly covered because that power is too immense. Generation VII Alola #— Kanto #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Generation VII . Generation VIII Galar #209 Isle of Armor #— Crown Tundra #— Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Brilliant Diamond, Shining Pearl , and Legends: Arceus . Male Sword Revealing the eyelike patterns on the insides of its ears will unleash its psychic powers. It normally keeps the patterns hidden, however. Shield The defensive instinct of the males is strong. It's when they're protecting themselves or their partners that they unleash their full power. Female Sword Females are a bit more selfish and aggressive than males. If they don't get what they want, they will torment you with their psychic abilities. Shield If it doesn't hold back when it unleashes its psychic power, it can tear apart a tanker. Its unfriendliness is part of its charm. Generation IX Paldea #— Kitakami #— Blueberry #105 Lumiose #044 Hyperspace #— Male Scarlet Though it has enough psychic power to blast away any opponent, Meowstic prefers to support its allies rather than attack. Violet If Meowstic continuously emits its powerful psychic energy, it will damage its own body. Legends: Z-A When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck into dust. Female Scarlet Female Meowstic are more aggressive than males. Their expression remains blank even while they're wielding immense psychic power. Violet When they sense danger, they exert their psychic power at its maximum output. They have no regard for their opponents. Legends: Z-A Females are a bit more selfish and aggressive than males. If they don't get what they want, they will torment you with their psychic abilities. Mega Meowstic Legends: Z-A Mega Meowstic can use its psychic power to compress or expand anything. It overwhelms foes by contorting space itself. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . Meowstic in the Blueberry Pokédex Game locations [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation VI. Generation VIII Galar #209 Isle of Armor #— Crown Tundra #— Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Brilliant Diamond, Shining Pearl , and Legends: Arceus . Male Sword Revealing the eyelike patterns on the insides of its ears will unleash its psychic powers. It normally keeps the patterns hidden, however. Shield The defensive instinct of the males is strong. It's when they're protecting themselves or their partners that they unleash their full power. Female Sword Females are a bit more selfish and aggressive than males. If they don't get what they want, they will torment you with their psychic abilities. Shield If it doesn't hold back when it unleashes its psychic power, it can tear apart a tanker. Its unfriendliness is part of its charm. Generation IX Paldea #— Kitakami #— Blueberry #105 Lumiose #044 Hyperspace #— Male Scarlet Though it has enough psychic power to blast away any opponent, Meowstic prefers to support its allies rather than attack. Violet If Meowstic continuously emits its powerful psychic energy, it will damage its own body. Legends: Z-A When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck into dust. Female Scarlet Female Meowstic are more aggressive than males. Their expression remains blank even while they're wielding immense psychic power. Violet When they sense danger, they exert their psychic power at its maximum output. They have no regard for their opponents. Legends: Z-A Females are a bit more selfish and aggressive than males. If they don't get what they want, they will torment you with their psychic abilities. Mega Meowstic Legends: Z-A Mega Meowstic can use its psychic power to compress or expand anything. It overwhelms foes by contorting space itself. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . Meowstic in the Blueberry Pokédex

sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry XY045 Meowstic Serena's Pokédex Meowstic, the Constraint Pokémon. When faced with trouble, Meowstic will raise its ears and create enough psychic power to demolish a ten-ton truck. Its appearance varies, depending on gender. Episode Pokémon Source Entry JN081 Meowstic Goh's Rotom Phone Meowstic, the Constraint Pokémon. A Psychic type. The male Meowstic has defensive talents, and when protecting itself or its partner, can produce power of the highest level.
